hero.title: Julien Glin
hero.subtitle: Computer Engineering Student @EPITA
hero.description: Motivated French computer engineering student @EPITA, specialising in technologies for the industry of the future and passionate about racing and cars. Seeking a 26-week Software Engineer internship starting March 2026.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate about technology and motorsport
about.bio: Motivated French computer engineering student @EPITA, specialising in technologies for the industry of the future (IoT, Big Data, AI, Cybersecurity) and passionate about racing and cars. Experienced in front-end and back-end development as well as technical project management. Currently seeking a 26-week Software Engineer internship or fixed-term contract starting March 2026.

elipce.title: Intern Developer
elipce.description: Full-stack development on test management platform and blacklisted card system
achievements: Developed web-based test management platform with collaborative features similar to Google Docs (React.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL)
Created blacklisted card visualization system for Thessaloniki metro in C# with ASP.NET
Drafted precise technical documents including functional specifications and test logs
Conducted comprehensive project review leading to complete redesign of specifications and database schema optimization
Ensured smooth collaboration between developers and efficient deployment of 100% of planned functionalities

ingurop.title: Intern Developer
ingurop.description: Development and optimization of business management tools
achievements: Designed and developed automated backup system in PHP to prevent data loss
Created schedule management tool in Windev improving internal organization
Autonomous end-to-end project management with full responsibility for the development cycle

epita.description: Computer Science Engineering - French engineering degree (equivalent to MSc)
achievements: "Future Industry" specialization (IoT, Big Data, AI, Industrial Engineering, Cybersecurity, Industrial networks)
Looking for 26-week paid internship starting March 2026
